# ShakiLabs UI artifact

`shakilabs-ui-0.2.5.tgz` is the active exact artifact for `@shakilabs/ui` 0.2.5.

- Source repository: `00.root-shakilabs`
- Source commit: `7813d5b`
- SHA-256: `b407e9ae31b6bc7573a4872abd39b8e0ced28d7107abf1aac37d87dea6ea1f11`
- Rollback artifacts: `shakilabs-ui-0.2.4.tgz`, `shakilabs-ui-0.2.3.tgz`, `shakilabs-ui-0.2.2.tgz`, `shakilabs-ui-0.2.1.tgz`, `shakilabs-ui-0.1.0.tgz`

All artifacts are committed so an isolated Vercel checkout can run `npm ci` without a private registry token.
